The latest Export-Import Bank of India (Exim Bank) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Deputy Manager (Information Security) posts! Published vide Advertisement No. HRM/DM/2026-27/03, this new recruitment drive offers 4 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants with a minimum 60% in full-time B.E./B.Tech./M.Tech./M.E./M.C.A. in Computer Science/IT/Electronics & Communication from a recognized University/Institute, with minimum 1 year of relevant experience, and aged between 21 to 28 years (as on 01-05-2026) can apply online from 26-05-2026 to 14-06-2026. Find all details about the Exim Bank Deputy Manager new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

FOLLOW US

Export-Import Bank of India Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Export-Import Bank of India (Exim Bank), an all-India premier financial institution engaged in financing, facilitating and promoting India's international trade, has officially released Advertisement No. HRM/DM/2026-27/03 for Direct Recruitment of Deputy Managers (Information Security). The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility criteria, age limits, salary, selection process, examination pattern, application fee, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying online at https://www.eximbankindia.in/careers.

  • Download Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

Export-Import Bank of India Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 Overview

Exim Bank is recruiting 4 Deputy Manager (Information Security) posts through Direct Recruitment, last date 14 June 2026.

Organization Name Export-Import Bank of India (Exim Bank / India Exim Bank)
Advertisement No. HRM/DM/2026-27/03
Post Name Deputy Manager (Information Security) - Grade/Scale: Deputy Manager (I)
Total Vacancies 04 (UR-03, OBC (NCL)-01)
Pay Scale Rs. 48,480-2000-62,480-2340-67,160-2680-85,920 (Current CTC approximately Rs. 18 lakh per annum at the beginning of pay scale)
Job Type Regular / Permanent - Officers Cadre (Group A); selected candidates required to serve anywhere in India; may also be transferred to offices outside India with consent
Application Mode Online only - at https://www.eximbankindia.in/careers
Selection Mode Written Test (Professional Knowledge - Objective) + Personal Interview (Weightage: Written 70%, Interview 30%)
Service Bond Personal bond of Rs. 3 lakh to serve the Bank for a minimum period of 5 years from date of joining
Website Link Opens 26-05-2026
Last Date for Application & Fee Payment 14-06-2026
Official Website https://www.eximbankindia.in/careers

Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Website Application Link Opens 26-05-2026
Last Day for Applying and Payment of Examination Fee 14-06-2026
Age Calculated As On 01-05-2026
Eligibility Date (Qualification & Experience) 14-06-2026 (last date of applying)
Tentative Month of Written Examination July 2026* (exact date via call letter and Bank's website)
Personal Interview To be notified after Written Test shortlisting (at Mumbai and New Delhi only)

Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 4 Deputy Manager (Information Security) vacancies have been announced under Advertisement No. HRM/DM/2026-27/03. Reservations are applicable as per prevailing Government of India guidelines. The Bank reserves the right to cancel/restrict/curtail/enlarge the recruitment process or revise the number of vacancies without notice.

Position UR OBC (NCL) Total
Deputy Manager (Information Security) 03 01 04

Abbreviations: UR – Unreserved, OBC (NCL) – Other Backward Classes (Non-Creamy Layer). Note: Reservations for SC/ST/EWS/PwBD as applicable per prevailing GoI guidelines. Selected candidates will be posted anywhere in India as per Bank's requirement and may be transferred to offices outside India with consent.

Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions (qualification, experience, and age) as on the prescribed dates. Only Indian Citizens are eligible to apply. Candidates having completed their graduation/post-graduation through correspondence/part-time/open university/open learning/external/distance learning are NOT eligible. For CGPA-based grading, candidates must provide a conversion letter from the Head of Institute/Controller of Examination if the equivalent percentage is not mentioned on the marksheet/certificate.

Criteria Details
Nationality Indian Citizens only.
Essential Academic Qualification Minimum 60% aggregate marks / equivalent CGPA in Full-time B.E./B.Tech./M.Tech./M.E./M.C.A. in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication from a University/Institute recognized/approved by Government/AICTE/UGC.
Essential Experience Minimum 1 year of experience in a Scheduled Commercial Bank or All India Financial Institution or any other organization of repute, in Information Security functions.
Preferred Certifications Preference given to candidates possessing any one of: CISA / CISM / CISSP / OSCP / CEH / CISP / CRTP / CCNA / CCNP / ISO 27001:2022 LA/LI / CompTIA Security+.
Additional Skills Excellent communication skills and proficiency in computers and information technology.
Not Eligible Candidates who completed graduation/post-graduation through correspondence/part-time/open university/open learning/external/distance learning are not eligible.
OBC Non-Creamy Layer OBC certificate must specifically contain a clause of non-creamy layer exclusion from GoI reservation benefits. Certificate must be valid as on last date of applying (issued within one year prior to last date). Caste name must tally letter by letter with Central Government list. OBC Creamy Layer candidates and those whose caste is not in Central List must apply as General.
Government Employees Candidates already in service must produce a proper relieving letter/discharge certificate in original from present employer at the time of joining, failing which they will not be allowed to join.
Service Bond Selected candidates must execute a personal bond of Rs. 3 lakh to serve the Bank for a minimum period of 5 years from date of joining.

Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Candidates must be not below 21 years and not above 28 years as on 01-05-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per Government of India guidelines. OBC (Creamy Layer) candidates must apply under General category and are not entitled to age relaxation.

Sr. No. Category Maximum Age (as on 01-05-2026)
1 General (UR) / EWS 28 years
2 OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 31 years (3 years relaxation)
3 Persons with Disabilities (PwBDs) 10 years relaxation over General limit
4 Ex-Servicemen 5 years relaxation (as per DOPT circular No. 36034/2/2013 dated 08-04-2013, for Group A direct recruitment through All India Competitive Examination)

Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Application fees and intimation charges are non-refundable. The process of registration is complete only when fee is deposited through online mode on or before the last date i.e. 14-06-2026. Bank transaction charges for online payment will have to be borne by the candidate. Fee once paid will not be refunded even if the applicant is not found eligible.

Category Application Fee / Intimation Charges
General / OBC (NCL) Rs. 600/- (Non-Refundable)
SC / ST / PwBD / EWS / Female candidates (all communities) Rs. 100/- (Intimation Charges only - Non-Refundable)

Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

Selection will be based on Written Test followed by Personal Interview. Candidates shortlisted based on written test performance will be called for Personal Interview. Final selection will be based on overall performance in both stages. Written Examination carries 70% weightage and Personal Interview carries 30% weightage in the final merit list. There will be no sectional cut-off in the written test. Exim Bank will analyse responses to detect patterns of similarity - if copying is inferred, candidature will be cancelled.

Stage 1 - Written Test (Professional Knowledge - Objective Type)

Name of the Test No. of Questions Maximum Marks Duration
Professional Knowledge - Objective (Part I: Information Technology and Cyber Security) 100 100 2 Hours 30 Minutes

Candidates may be required to be at the venue for about 4 hours (including time for document verification, instructions, etc.). No request for change of centre/venue/date/session will be entertained. Examination centres: Kolkata, Mumbai, New Delhi, Bengaluru, and Hyderabad (may change if sufficient candidates not available). Personal Interviews will be conducted only in Mumbai and New Delhi. Written test carries 70% weightage; Interview carries 30% weightage in final merit.

Stage 2 - Personal Interview

Candidates shortlisted on the basis of written test performance will be called for Personal Interview at Mumbai or New Delhi. Candidates must produce original degree certificates, caste, experience and other relevant certificates at the time of interview. Candidates already in service must carry a proper relieving letter/discharge certificate from their present employer at the time of joining.

Exim Bank Deputy Manager (Information Security) Recruitment 2026 - Pre-Recruitment Training

A pre-recruitment training will be organized for candidates from reserved categories. Details of the training and its mode of delivery (online/offline) will be intimated to candidates who opt for it through the online application form. Details will be shared after the last date of registration.

Who should NOT apply for Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026?

  • Candidates who do not hold a full-time B.E./B.Tech./M.Tech./M.E./M.C.A. in Computer Science/IT/Electronics & Communication - degrees from other disciplines or part-time/distance/correspondence courses are strictly ineligible.
  • Candidates with aggregate marks below 60% in their qualifying degree - the 60% minimum is a hard eligibility condition.
  • Candidates who do not have at least 1 year of post-qualification experience in Information Security functions in a Scheduled Commercial Bank, All India Financial Institution, or other organization of repute - experience in unrelated IT roles does not qualify.
  • Candidates outside the age band of 21 to 28 years as on 01-05-2026 (except those entitled to OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen relaxation).
  • OBC Creamy Layer candidates expecting OBC reservation or age relaxation - they must apply as General.
  • Candidates not willing to serve anywhere in India - posting is at the Bank's requirement at any location in India including transfers to overseas offices with consent.
  • Candidates who cannot commit to the 5-year service bond of Rs. 3 lakh - this bond is mandatory and must be executed at the time of joining.
  • Candidates currently in government service who cannot produce a proper relieving letter/discharge certificate from their employer at the time of joining - they will not be allowed to join without it.

Common mistakes / What to check before applying Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026?

  • Uploading a signature in CAPITAL LETTERS - capital letter signatures are not accepted and will lead to rejection.
  • Not writing the handwritten declaration personally in English - if written by anyone else or in any other language, the application will be declared invalid.
  • Not uploading a live photograph via webcam/mobile at the time of filling the application - this is mandatory in addition to the static scanned photograph.
  • Uploading blurry, smudged, or unclear photograph, signature, left thumb impression, or handwritten declaration - such applications may be rejected; candidates should preview all uploads before final submission.
  • Not cross-checking that the name in the application exactly matches the name on the photo identity proof - any mismatch leads to denial of entry at the examination/interview; female candidates who have changed name post-marriage must be especially careful.
  • Clicking Back or Refresh during online fee payment - this may cause double charges; wait for server intimation after payment submission.
  • Not taking a printout of the e-Receipt and online application form after fee payment - this is required for future reference.
  • Not keeping the email ID and mobile number active till the end of the recruitment process - all communications including admit card, call letters, and results are sent only via email/SMS.
  • Not furnishing the CGPA conversion formula/letter from University/Institute if degree is CGPA-based - without this, the equivalent percentage cannot be verified and candidature may be rejected.
  • Waiting till the last date to apply - the Bank is not responsible for website outages or connectivity issues; candidates must apply well before 14-06-2026.

How to Apply for Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026

Eligible candidates must apply online only through the link available on the Bank's Careers page at https://www.eximbankindia.in/careers. The application link will be live from 26-05-2026. No other means or mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates must scan and keep ready all required documents. The application registration is complete only when fee is successfully paid online on or before 14-06-2026.

Documents to be Scanned and Uploaded before applying:

  • Recent passport-size colour photograph (4.5 cm × 3.5 cm; 200×230 pixels preferred; 20 KB–50 KB; JPEG) - light/white background, no caps, dark glasses or religious headwear covering face
  • Live photograph - to be captured via webcam or mobile phone QR scan at the time of filling the application form (mandatory in addition to static photo)
  • Signature with Black Ink on white paper (140×60 pixels preferred; 10 KB–20 KB; JPEG/JPG) - NOT in CAPITAL LETTERS
  • Left Thumb Impression on white paper with Black or Blue ink (240×240 pixels in 200 DPI preferred; 20 KB–50 KB; JPEG/JPG)
  • Handwritten Declaration in English on white paper with Black ink (800×400 pixels in 200 DPI preferred; 50 KB–100 KB; JPEG/JPG) - in candidate's own handwriting only
  • Consolidated Mark Sheets of Graduation & Post-Graduation (PDF; 20 KB–500 KB)
  • Graduation & Post-Graduation Degree Certificate (PDF; 20 KB–500 KB)
  • Caste Certificate - if applicable (PDF; 20 KB–500 KB)

Documents to be Produced in Original at the time of Written Examination / Interview:

  • Call Letter (downloaded from Bank's website) with original and photocopy of currently valid photo identity proof bearing exactly the same name as on the call letter - valid IDs: PAN Card, Passport, Permanent Driving License, Voter's Card, Bank Passbook with photograph, Photo identity proof issued by Gazetted Officer on official letterhead, Photo identity proof issued by People's Representative on official letterhead, valid College/University Identity Card, Aadhaar Card/E-Aadhaar with photograph, Employee ID, or Bar Council Identity Card. (Note: Ration Card and Learner's Driving License are NOT valid.)
  • Original degree certificates, caste certificate, experience certificates, and any other relevant certificates (at the time of interview)
  • In case of name change - original Gazette notification, original marriage certificate, or affidavit in original
  • CGPA conversion letter from Head of Institute/Controller of Examination (if CGPA-based grading)
  • Scribe undertaking and disability/medical certificate (for PwBD candidates requesting scribe facility - must be registered for scribe and compensatory time in online application form)

The handwritten declaration text is: "I, _______ (Name of the candidate), hereby declare that all the information submitted by me in the application form is correct, true and valid. I will present the supporting documents as and when required."

Candidates are advised to take a printout of the system-generated online application form after registration. No change/alteration is possible after clicking COMPLETE REGISTRATION. Any legal proceedings can be instituted only in Mumbai - Mumbai courts/tribunals/forums shall have sole and exclusive jurisdiction.

Apply Online at: https://www.eximbankindia.in/careers

Important Instructions for Exim Bank Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Application link will be live from 26-05-2026 and closes on 14-06-2026 - apply well in advance without waiting for the last date.
  • Registration is complete only when fee is paid online on or before 14-06-2026. Fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances.
  • Candidates must carry the call letter along with original and a photocopy of currently valid photo identity proof to the examination and interview - without these, entry will not be permitted.
  • The name on the call letter must exactly match the name on the photo identity proof - female candidates who have changed name post-marriage must note this carefully.
  • Candidates reporting late after the reporting time on the call letter will NOT be permitted to take the examination.
  • No request for change of examination centre/venue/date/session will be entertained.
  • Mobile phones (even in switched-off mode), pagers, or any electronic communication devices are strictly prohibited in the examination/interview hall - violation leads to disqualification and possible debarment from future Exim Bank recruitments.
  • Exim Bank will analyse response patterns - if response sharing is detected, candidature will be cancelled and results withheld.
  • Pre-recruitment training will be organized for reserved category candidates who opt for it in the online application form.
  • PwBD candidates requiring a scribe must arrange their own scribe at their own cost and must indicate the requirement in the online application form - subsequent requests may not be entertained. Eligible PwBD/locomotor disability/visually impaired candidates get 20 minutes of compensatory time per hour.
  • Selected candidates must execute a personal bond of Rs. 3 lakh to serve the Bank for a minimum of 5 years from date of joining.
  • Selected candidates will be posted anywhere in India as per Bank's requirement and may be transferred to overseas offices with consent.
  • Candidates already in service must produce a relieving letter/discharge certificate from present employer at the time of joining - without it, joining will not be permitted.
  • Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.
  • All matters regarding eligibility, selection process, results, etc. - the Bank's decision is final and binding. No correspondence will be entertained from ineligible or non-selected candidates.
  • Legal proceedings can only be instituted in Mumbai - Mumbai courts/tribunals/forums have sole and exclusive jurisdiction.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

South East Central Railway (SECR) has published the Act Apprentice Notification 2026 on 18-05-2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1079 Act Apprentice positions. Candidates within the age range of 15 to 24 years and holding Matriculation (10th) with minimum 50% marks along with ITI Certificate (NCVT/SCVT) in relevant trade are eligible to apply online at the secr.indianrailways.gov.in. The application process will be active from 19-05-2026 to 18-06-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

FOLLOW US

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

South East Central Railway, Divisional Office, Personnel Department, Kingsway, Nagpur has officially released Notification No. P/NGP/SAS/2024/16 dated 18/05/2026 for Engagement of Act Apprentices under the Apprentices Act 1961 and Apprenticeship Rule 1992 in Nagpur Division & Motibagh Workshop, Nagpur for the year 2026-27. The notification covers 977 slots for Nagpur Division and 102 slots for Motibagh Workshop across 23 and 8 designated trades respectively. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility conditions, age limits, educational qualifications, selection process, stipend, medical fitness, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying online.

  • Download SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name South East Central Railway (SECR), Divisional Office, Kingsway, Nagpur-440001
Notification No. P/NGP/SAS/2024/16 dated 18/05/2026
Post Name Act Apprentice (Trade Apprentice)
Under Act Apprentices Act 1961 & Apprenticeship Rule 1992
Unit Nagpur Division (Estt. Code: E05202702695) & Motibagh Workshop, Nagpur (Estt. Code: E05202702494)
Total Vacancies 1079 (977 – Nagpur Division + 102 – Motibagh Workshop)
Stipend As per prescribed rates (Central Apprenticeship Council norms)
Training Duration 1 (One) Year
Application Mode Online only (via https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in)
Selection Mode Merit List based on Matriculation % + ITI Marks
Official Website https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Date of Notification 18/05/2026
Opening of Online Application Portal 19-05-2026
Last Date for Online Application Submission 18-06-2026 (till 23:59 hrs)
Age Calculated As On 19-05-2026
Document Verification / Medical Examination Date To be notified separately

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 1079 Act Apprentice slots have been announced across 23 designated trades in Nagpur Division and 8 designated trades in Motibagh Workshop, Nagpur. Vacancies are distributed across UR, SC, ST, OBC, and EWS categories with separate provisions for PH (Physically Handicapped) and Ex-Servicemen. Vacancies may be increased or decreased at the discretion of the administration.

(i) Nagpur Division – Trade-wise Vacancy (Establishment Code: E05202702695) – Total: 977

Sl. No. Trade Total
1 Fitter 90
2 Carpenter 41
3 Welder 22

(ii) Motibagh Workshop, Nagpur – Trade-wise Vacancy (Establishment Code: E05202702494) – Total: 102

Note: Vacancies above may be increased/decreased at the discretion of administration, if necessary.

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date 19-05-2026. Before applying, candidates should ensure they fulfill the eligibility and other criteria. Engineering Graduates and Diploma Holders are not eligible to apply for apprenticeship in response to this notification as they are governed by a separate scheme of Apprenticeship. Candidates who have already done apprenticeship in any organization should not apply again - such candidatures will not be entertained.

Educational Qualification

Qualification Details
Matriculation (10th) Passed Matriculation or equivalent with minimum 50% marks from a recognized board.
ITI Certificate National Trade Certificate (NTC) in the notified trade issued by NCVT, or Provisional Certificate issued by NCVT/SCVT. Candidate must fill their 10th & ITI marks on the portal in qualification section; otherwise the application will be automatically rejected. No other higher qualification to be filled.

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Candidates must be minimum 15 years and not more than 24 years of age as on 19-05-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), Divyang/PWBD and Ex-Servicemen (10 years). For Ex-Servicemen, an additional 10 years relaxation (plus 3 years if continuous service of 6 months) is also applicable. Age relaxation for OBC and SC/ST candidates is subject to submission of the latest caste certificate in central format. The upper age limit shall not exceed the relaxed limit in any case.

Community-wise Date of Birth Range (Age as on 19.05.2026)

Sl. No. Community Date of Birth (Between)
1 UR (Unreserved) 19.05.2002 to 19.05.2011
2 OBC (Other Backward Class) 19.05.1999 to 19.05.2011
3 SC / ST 19.05.1997 to 19.05.2011
4 PWBD / Ex-Serviceman 19.05.1992 to 19.05.2011

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

The notification does not mention any application fee for SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official NAPS portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in for any fee-related updates before applying.

Category Application Fee
All Categories No application fee mentioned (refer official portal for updates)

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

Selection will be based on a merit list prepared for all candidates who apply against the notification. The merit list will be prepared on the basis of percentage of marks in Matriculation (minimum 50% aggregate) plus ITI marks in the trade in which Apprenticeship is to be done. For candidates from boards like Board of Secondary Education Andhra Pradesh and Board of Public Examination Kerala (grade-based systems), SECR Nagpur Division will take the midpoint of the range of grades obtained, treating each subject as out of 100 marks for average calculation. Shortlisted candidates will be subject to verification of all original testimonials and appropriate medical examination. After selection, requests to change division/unit will not be entertained.

Tie-Breaking Rules

1st Tie-Break Candidate with older age shall be preferred
2nd Tie-Break Candidate who passed Matriculation exam earlier shall be considered first (if date of birth is also the same)

How to Apply for SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in (Establishment Code: E05202702695 for Nagpur Division; E05202702494 for Motibagh Workshop). The online portal will be active from 19-05-2026 to 18-06-2026 (23:59 hrs).

Candidates must carefully fill their 10th and ITI marks on the portal in the qualification section - if these marks do not appear in the downloaded Excel file, the candidature will be rejected. Do not fill any other higher qualification. Candidates have to choose either Nagpur Division or Motibagh Workshop at the time of application.

A unique registration number will be issued to each applicant during online submission - candidates are advised to save/note it for future correspondence. If the EWS/Ex-Servicemen option is not available on the portal, apply under your actual category and submit the EWS/Ex-Servicemen certificate physically to this office.

Documents Required at the Time of Document Verification (on being called):

  • Matriculation / 10th Standard Mark Sheet and Certificate (original)
  • ITI National Trade Certificate (NTC) or Provisional Certificate from NCVT/SCVT
  • SC / ST / OBC / EWS / PWBD certificate in central format (if applicable)
  • Discharge Certificate (for Ex-Servicemen) or Armed Forces serving certificate (for children of Armed Forces personnel)
  • Disability Certificate issued by a competent authority (for PWBD candidates) as per Annexure III/IV/V/VI
  • Medical Certificate at the time of joining in prescribed proforma (signed by a Government Authorized Gazetted Doctor, not below the rank of Assistant Surgeon of Central/State Hospital)

No daily allowance, conveyance allowance, or travelling allowance will be paid to candidates called for document verification. No accommodation will be provided by Railway for apprentices.

Apply Online at: https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in

Important Instructions for SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Applications must be submitted online only through https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in; no other mode of application will be accepted.
  • Candidates must fill 10th and ITI marks carefully on the NAPS portal; failure to do so will result in automatic rejection of the application.
  • Engineering Graduates and Diploma Holders are not eligible to apply under this notification.
  • Candidates who have previously done apprenticeship in any organization must not apply again; such candidatures will not be entertained.
  • Candidature will be cancelled if the candidate fails to produce required original testimonials for verification or any discrepancy is noticed.
  • If it is found that a candidate has submitted wrong/fake/false certificates, the Railway administration reserves the right to discharge the candidate at any stage without notice; they may also be liable for penal action.
  • After selection for engagement, requests to change division/unit will not be entertained.
  • No accommodation will be provided by Railway for apprentices; they must make their own arrangements.
  • No daily allowance, conveyance allowance, or travelling allowance will be paid to candidates called for document verification.
  • Age relaxation for OBC candidates is subject to submission of the latest OBC caste certificate in central format; age relaxation for SC/ST is subject to submission of caste certificate in central format.
  • The Railway administration does not undertake responsibility for sending replies to candidates not selected or not called; no correspondence will be entertained.
  • The decision of the administration regarding eligibility and selection at any level is final and binding.

How to Download RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Admit Card 2026?

Follow these simple steps to download your RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Admit Card 2026:

  1. Step 1: Visit your respective Regional RRB website or go to rrb.digialm.com

Not Allowed in Examination Hall:

Important Instructions for RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Exam 2026

Before Exam Day:

  • Download admit card 2-3 days before your exam date
  • Verify exam center location on Google Maps
  • Plan your route and transportation
  • Carry only allowed items

On Exam Day:

  • Reach exam center 60-90 minutes before reporting time

What If RRB NTPC Admit Card Not Available?

Important: Act immediately if facing issues. Don't wait until exam day.

How to Calculate Your Score Using AP High Court Answer Key 2026?

Total Score = (Correct Answers × Marks per Question) – (Wrong Answers × Negative Marking)

  • Wrong Answer: 0 (No negative marking)
  • Unattempted: 0 marks

FOLLOW US

The final result was declared on March 6, 2026, recommending 958 candidates (including toppers and category-wise selections). It is available as a PDF for recommended candidates, with individual detailed marksheets accessible via login for all appeared candidates.
